message:
fix(ui): fix basket sidebar, nav badge, and swipe-to-copy

- BasketSidebar: increase z-index to z-[9999] to avoid stacking conflicts
- BasketSidebar: use explicit bg-white/dark:bg-neutral-950 for solid background
- Nav: add overflow-visible to prevent badge clipping
- Nav: adjust badge position and size for better visibility
- SwipeablePromptCard: add clipboard fallback for iOS Safari
- SwipeablePromptCard: add proper error logging and user-friendly error message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
